Now let me also check for other important project repos that should be synced.

arguments.command:
# Find git repos in common project locations
for dir in /Users/landonking/Projects /Users/landonking/Developer /Users/landonking/dev /Users/landonking/Documents; do
  if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
    find "$dir" -maxdepth 2 -name ".git" -type d 2>/dev/null | while read g; do
      repo=$(dirname "$g")
      remote=$(cd "$repo" && git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null || echo "no-remote")
      dirty=$(cd "$repo" && git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -1)
      echo "$repo | remote=$remote | ${dirty:+DIRTY}"
    done
  fi
done

arguments.command:
# Check which of these are git repos with GitHub remotes
for d in VisionClaw hermes-agent; do
  if [ -d "/Users/landonking/$d/.git" ]; then
    remote=$(cd "/Users/landonking/$d" && git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null || echo "no-remote")
    dirty=$(cd "/Users/landonking/$d" && git status --short 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
    branch=$(cd "/Users/landonking/$d" && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)
    echo "$d | branch=$branch | remote=$remote | dirty_files=$dirty"
  else
    echo "$d | no .git"
  fi
done

content.text: Good. Now let me do the actual sync — stage, commit, and push all the key repos.

arguments.command:
# 1. Sync openclaw workspace repo
cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace
echo "=== Workspace Repo ==="
git add -A 2>&1
changes=$(git diff --cached --stat 2>/dev/null | tail -1)
if [ -n "$changes" ]; then
  git commit -m "sync: version save $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%MZ)" 2>&1 | tail -5
  git push github main 2>&1 | tail -5
else
  echo "No changes to commit"
  git push github main 2>&1 | tail -3
fi

arguments.command:
# 2. Sync openclaw config repo
cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw
echo "=== OpenClaw Config Repo ==="
git add -A 2>&1
changes=$(git diff --cached --stat 2>/dev/null | tail -1)
if [ -n "$changes" ]; then
  git commit -m "sync: version save $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%MZ)" 2>&1 | tail -5
  git push origin main 2>&1 | tail -5
else
  echo "No changes to commit"
  git push origin main 2>&1 | tail -3
fi
